name: Raytracer — Native WebGPU (wgpu-native)
description: The desktop twin of the WebGPU compute raytracer (example 49): the SAME scene authored in Rae and the SAME raytrace.wgsl, run on the native GPU via wgpu-native (Metal/Vulkan/D3D12) and presented through SDL3. One WGSL shader, browser + native. Compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native (WGPU_NATIVE, default ~/.local/wgpu-native).
